message:
test(ftui-render): add 14 proptest invariants for BufferDiff algorithm

Property-based tests covering:
- Identical buffers produce empty diff
- Change positions always within bounds
- No false positives (every reported change truly differs)
- No false negatives (every true difference is found)
- Determinism (same inputs → same output)
- compute/compute_into equivalence
- Runs cover exactly the same positions as raw changes
- Row-major ordering of changes
- Full diff covers every cell
- Runs sorted and non-overlapping
- Dirty diff is superset of exact diff
- Diff symmetry (|diff(A,B)| == |diff(B,A)|)
- compute_into clears previous state

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
